name: blueline-cad
description: Blueline CAD computer-aided dispatch system for law enforcement

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm start"
scripts.dev:lan: concurrently "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm run start:lan"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=server && npm run lint --workspace=client
